candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and preferred candidate; matches Net sales values.
Not revenue; this is COGS, so not suitable for REVT.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Valid COGS/cost of sales total and provided in candidate list.

variables.notes: Although 'Costs of goods sold' also appears in the sheet, the provided candidate is a semantically correct COGS line and matches the same values.

candidates.why: Overhead-type operating expense bucket; not a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present, so selected the best overhead component rows and excluded totals, COGS, D&A, impairments, and finance items.
No R&D/research and development line is visible in the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Interest-related expense but appears to cover only lease liabilities, not necessarily total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred as the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the candidate list because the candidates only capture lease-interest labels, while the sheet also contains 'Interest payable to credit institutions', which is the more direct interest expense line. Included 'Interest on lease liabilities' as fallback if reporting changes by year. Manual review is needed because total interest expense may be split across financing sources rather than presented as one consolidated line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest payable to credit institutions

candidates.why: Valid total equity line, but less preferred if an owners/parent-only equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent LIABILITIES Non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Despite the malformed text, this is the owner-attributable equity line and is preferred over Total Equity to avoid double counting with MIB.
Not equity; total balance sheet size.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent LIABILITIES Non-current liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred the owner-attributable equity label first to exclude any non-controlling interests if present. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback because labels may vary across years.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is an income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest/non-controlling interests is visible. Since BE uses owner-attributable equity first, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
